mapper.select: SELECT form_code, item_group, item_code, item_name, input_type, field_type, dict_type, label, min, max, min_length, max_length, placeholder, required, default_value, rules, clearable FROM mdm_form_item WHERE `status` = 1 AND form_code = #{formCode} ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC

SELECT form_code, item_group, item_code, item_name, input_type, field_type, dict_type, label, min, max, min_length, max_length, placeholder, required, default_value, rules, clearable FROM mdm_form_item WHERE `status` = 1 ORDER BY sort ASC, id ASC
